Hero.title:
The Best for Your
Eye Health
Hero.subtitle: We are here for a clearer world with our expert staff and state-of-the-art systems.

About.title: See Clearly with Megagöz
About.description: As Megagöz Eye Health Center, we aim to protect and improve your eye health at the highest level with our expert doctors and modern technology.

Services.title: Services We Provide
Services.description: We offer comprehensive solutions for your eye health with state-of-the-art technologies and our experienced expert staff.

cataract.title: Cataract Surgery
cataract.description: Achieve clear vision with Phacoemulsification and smart lens (intraocular lens) applications.

laser.title: Laser Treatment
laser.description: Say goodbye to glasses in myopia, hypermetropia, and astigmatism with No-Touch, LASIK, and PRK methods.

retina.title: Retinal Diseases
retina.description: Early diagnosis and modern treatment methods for diabetic retinopathy, macular degeneration, and retinal tears.

glaucoma.title: Glaucoma
glaucoma.description: Regular follow-up and control of insidiously progressive glaucoma with medication or surgery.

pediatric.title: Pediatric Eye Care
pediatric.description: Expert evaluation of childhood strabismus, lazy eye (amblyopia), and other eye problems.

cornea.title: Corneal Diseases
cornea.description: Advanced treatments for keratoconus (Cross-linking), corneal transplantation, and dry eye syndrome.
